title: Air India Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Air India Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Air India Cargo family as a Warehouse Manager in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Air India Cargo:
Air India Cargo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India Cargo!
